project_context.name: Swar Shah
project_context.role: Software Engineer | AI & Full Stack Consultant
project_context.position: Junior Associate Software Developer at Synechron
project_context.goal: Convert visitors into paying clients for high-ticket software projects (₹50k - ₹10L).
project_context.vibe: Premium, trusted, luxury software agency. Apple + Linear + Stripe + Vercel aesthetic.
project_context.archetype: Hybrid of 4 (Swiss/High-Contrast) and 5 (Luxury) with Electric Accents

gradients.card_hover: radial-gradient(800px circle at var(--mouse-x) var(--mouse-y), rgba(255,255,255,0.06), transparent 40%)

global.header: Fixed top, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/5. Logo left, Nav center (hidden on mobile), CTA right. Use Framer Motion for scroll-hide logic.
global.footer: Generous py-32 bg-black. Massive 'Let's Build' heading. Grid layout for links. Social icons in circles. Dark minimalist aesthetic.
global.sticky_cta: Fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50. Magnetic button effect. Pulsing glow.

1_hero.style: Vercel / Linear aesthetic. Center aligned. Massive Space Grotesk H1. Subtitle in Inter. Two buttons (Primary Blue, Secondary outline).
1_hero.background: Geist-style CSS grid lines (10% opacity, 24px spacing) + top-center radial gradient glow.
1_hero.animation: Framer Motion staggered fade-up. Floating tech icons in the background (React, Node, AWS).

2_trust_section.style: Subtle, desaturated grayscale logos turning color on hover. Text: 'Trusted by enterprise teams and fast-growing startups'.

3_industries.layout: Grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4. Minimal pill-shaped cards with small Lucide icons.

4_services.layout: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris). 1 large card (Custom Web Apps), 2 medium (AI, Dashboards), 2 small. Hover: Linear-style mouse-tracking gradient.

5_why_me.layout: List-based or alternating zigzag layout. Focus on business value (revenue, speed) over code.

6_featured_projects.layout: Sticky vertical scroll. Left side: Sticky text details. Right side: Scrolling project images.
6_featured_projects.cards: Image takes 70% of card, details 30%. Deep dive link styled as an arrow.

7_process.layout: Vertical timeline with glowing line (Tracing Beam effect). Animated progress based on scroll.

8_testimonials.layout: Masonry grid or horizontal CSS scroll. Cards with quotes, user avatar, and company.

9_faq.component: Shadcn Accordion. 1px bottom border per item. Clean, no background box.

10_about.layout: 2-column. Left: Professional portrait with subtle gradient border. Right: Bio focusing on 'business-first software'.

11_tech_stack.layout: Infinite Marquee (react-fast-marquee) of tech icons. Monochromatic until hovered.

12_blog.layout: 3-column grid. Clean, editorial feel. Date and reading time overlines.

13_contact.layout: 2-column. Left: Calendly embed or direct contact info. Right: Shadcn Form (Name, Email, Project Details, Budget Dropdown).

case_study.hero: Full width image with 50% bottom-to-top black gradient overlay. Title and metrics over image.
case_study.content: Centered max-w-3xl for reading. Sections for Problem, Solution, Tech, Results.

blog_listing.layout: Header with 'Thoughts & Engineering'. Grid of articles. Tags for filtering.

blog_detail.layout: Narrow reading column (max-w-2xl). Large typography. Prose styling (Tailwind Typography plugin adapted for dark mode).

admin_cms.layout: Control Room Grid (Mode B). Dense. Sidebar navigation. Table views for posts. Shadcn inputs and markdown editor.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2563EB] hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 backdrop-blur-sm
buttons.magnetic: Use framer-motion to track mouse offset and slightly translate button container.

inputs.base: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 rounded-xl focus:border-[#2563EB] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2563EB] text-white

interactions_and_motion.page_transition: Framer motion AnimatePresence. Fade in and slide up (y: 20 -> 0).
interactions_and_motion.cursor: Custom div following mouse pointer. Mix-blend-mode: difference. Expands on hovering links.
interactions_and_motion.hover_effects: Cards use a mouse-tracking radial gradient mask to reveal a brighter border/background on hover.
interactions_and_motion.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

assets.guidelines: Use next/image or native img. Maintain aspect ratios. Ensure alt tags.

images.description: Blue to purple gradient - use as absolute positioned background with heavy blur (blur-[120px]) and low opacity (20%) for Vercel-style glow.
Professional man in tech - placeholder for Swar Shah.
Modern architecture for real estate project placeholder.
Dark aesthetic gym for fitness app placeholder.
Modern dark office desk for SaaS/Startup project placeholder.

implementation_instructions.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons. Use 'react-icons/si' for brand/tech logos (React, Node, AWS, etc.).
implementation_instructions.tailwind_config: Extend colors with the provided hex codes. Add animations for marquee, fade-in, and gradient-shift.
implementation_instructions.quality_assurance: Ensure all text contrast meets WCAG AA on dark backgrounds. Add data-testid to everything interactive.
